benchmark_intent: Top one or two AI empires plausibly crisis-ready by 2350 without hidden bonuses.
status_note: Patched rerun launched through Irony. Startup modals cleared with Giga-Experience and Gulli default/recommended options. Stellar AI Director startup proof saved, commands_at_date.txt advanced the game to observer-like zero-resource state at Fastest speed by 2200.09.27. The 2250, 2300, and 2325 checkpoint pauses fired; autosave_2250.01.01.sav, autosave_2300.01.01.sav, and autosave_2325.01.01.sav were preserved and parsed. The 2325 aggregate economy/research/fleet track was far behind observer-20260707T050444Z, and the prior run was already weak by 2350, so this run was stopped early. Save evidence showed plausible midgame builders around +123 to +127 alloys/month were still blocked by a +200 alloy income gate; the generated Director patch was updated and validated to lower the under-cap fleet income lane to +100 alloys/month. Fresh rerun required before runtime claims.
